title: adelphia macrophylla
intro: Adelphia macrophylla, also known as the "Mangosteen tree" or "Purple Mangosteen", is a tropical evergreen tree native to Southeast Asia, characterized by its large, dark green leaves and purple fruit. The bark and leaves of the Adelphia macrophylla plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Adelphia macrophylla include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Adelphia macrophylla typically involve drying the leaves and bark, then infusing them in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
